scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @caishen/api" "npm run dev -w @caishen/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @caishen/web && npm run build -w @caishen/api && npm run build -w @caishen/taobao-extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @caishen/api && npm run test -w @caishen/taobao-extension
